HOME.TITLE: Welcome to Family Tree App
HOME.DESCRIPTION: This site allows you to add people and build your genealogical tree. You can add new members, modify existing information, and view family relationships clearly and intuitively.

FEATURES.TEXT1: Enter the name, surname, birth date, and gender of family members.
FEATURES.TEXT2: Easily visualize relationships between parents and children and build your tree.
FEATURES.TEXT3: You can update member information at any time in a simple way.

ABOUT.TITLE: About
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Discover the story behind the Family Tree App project.

WHO_AM_I.TITLE: Who I Am
WHO_AM_I.P1: Hi! My name is Francesco Di Domenico. I am the developer of this web application, created with passion to help people discover and visualize their family connections.
WHO_AM_I.P2: With a strong dedication to technology and design, I developed this tool to make exploring the genealogical history of every family accessible and fascinating.

WHAT_IT_DOES.TITLE: What This Site Does
WHAT_IT_DOES.INTRO: This application is an interactive family tree generator. It allows you to:

ITEMS.ITEM1: Manage and organize your family members' data
ITEMS.ITEM2: Visualize family relationships in a dynamic and intuitive way
ITEMS.ITEM3: Explore ancestors and descendants with a simple click
ITEMS.ITEM4: View your family tree with modern and eye-catching graphics
ITEMS.ITEM5: Discover hidden connections between your family members

MISSION.TITLE: My Mission
MISSION.TEXT: I want to make genealogy accessible and engaging for everyone. My goal is to provide a powerful yet easy-to-use tool that allows you to preserve and share your family history for future generations.
